description: The water is irregularly supplied in my area.

messages.text: I want to register and come back.

I'd be happy to help you with that. Before we begin, I just want to clarify that I'm here to listen to your concerns and help you resolve the issue. Please feel free to share as much or as little as you're comfortable with.

The water is irregularly supplied in my areas

Can I confirm that your water supply is coming and going at random times, and sometimes you don't have access to water at all?
